subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, O assured leaf! His honor Áqá Siyyid Naṣru'lláh, like the messenger of Saba, to the central seat of the Abhá Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه موقنه حضرت آقا سید نصرالله چون پیک سباء بمرکز سریر جمال ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @thankfulness; gratitude
